pain_point_label: No Systematic Employer Communication or CRM

matches.match_rationale: The pain point explicitly includes lack of regular touchpoints — quarterly newsletters, event invitations, and company announcements. AI text generation can produce personalized, context-aware employer communications at scale, drawing on each employer's profile, sector, and engagement history. For a multi-site education operator, this directly addresses the absence of systematic outreach without requiring a large communications team.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-assisted employer communication tool that drafts tailored newsletters, event invitations, and partnership updates for each employer contact based on their industry and past engagement — reducing effort per campus while maintaining consistent, professional outreach across the network.

matches.match_rationale: Employer contact details are scattered across spreadsheets and email inboxes. Entity extraction can parse unstructured email threads and documents to identify and pull employer names, job titles, phone numbers, email addresses, and company details into a structured database. This directly tackles the fragmentation problem and is a prerequisite for any CRM-like consolidation.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An ingestion pipeline that processes historical email archives and spreadsheet exports, automatically extracting employer contact records and relationship metadata to seed a centralized employer database — replacing manual data entry as the migration path.

matches.match_rationale: Employer data exists across multiple spreadsheets with inconsistent schemas, column naming, and formats per campus. Data transformation AI can normalize these semi-structured sources — standardizing field names, deduplicating records, and mapping them to a unified employer schema. This directly addresses the 'duplicate outreach from different campuses' problem by creating a single canonical record per employer.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An AI-powered data consolidation layer that ingests per-campus employer spreadsheets, resolves duplicates, normalizes contact and company fields, and outputs a clean unified employer database — enabling cross-campus CRM without requiring upfront manual cleanup.

matches.match_rationale: The end-to-end employer relationship workflow — capturing new contacts from emails, updating records, triggering scheduled touchpoints, deduplicating cross-campus entries, and flagging lapsed relationships — is a multi-step process that spans several systems and decision points. A task automation agent can orchestrate these steps autonomously: parse inbound emails for new employer signals, update the central database, queue communications, and alert staff when a relationship has gone cold or when a departing staff member owned key contacts.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An autonomous employer relationship management agent that monitors inboxes, extracts new employer contacts, deduplicates across campuses, schedules touchpoint reminders, and drafts outreach — acting as a lightweight AI-powered CRM layer on top of existing email infrastructure.
